name: RPlog_Giles_Vermillion
title: Giles Vermillion
summary: At the Grand Palanhi Hotel, Luke Skywalker waits in the shadows while Lando Calrissian scouts for Imperial trouble, and Jessalyn Valios arrives to collect the scholarly smuggler Paul Nighman, who has been researching Jedi artifacts on Mandalore. As the group gathers at the Palanhi starport to board the Black Dragon, the menacing red-haired bounty hunter Giles Vermillion -- who once forced Jessalyn to witness him mutilate a man -- emerges and confronts them. A vicious fight erupts: Vermillion stabs Paul with hidden wrist blades before Paul shoots the weapon from his hand and drives him off, leaving Paul gravely wounded and muttering about Mandalore. Jessalyn and Shenner haul Paul aboard and tend his bleeding until Luke arrives and uses the Force to ease Paul's pain and partly close the wounds, earning the awe of the streetwise Shenner. As the danger passes, the companions share quiet, tender moments -- Shenner playing guitar for Paul, Lando bidding farewell to his Nkllon project, and Jessalyn and Luke tinkering in the engine room amid unspoken feelings -- before resolving to leave Palanhi in the morning.
